author: jcig789
description: Multi-currency personal finance for Obsidian. Track spending, budgets, net worth, and loans — all in your vault. No accounts, no subscriptions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jcig789
manifest.description: Multi-currency personal finance. Track spending, budgets, net worth, and international transfers — all in your vault.
manifest.name: Ledgr

name: Ledgr

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Net Worth History Chart
-A new chart appears above the Total Assets / Liabilities / Net Worth cards on the Net Worth tab. Shows your net worth trajectory over time with period delta, month-over-month delta, and a 6M / 1Y / ALL range selector.
- Monthly Snapshots
- Every time you save your net worth, a monthly snapshot is recorded. The Bearing's Momentum pillar now uses real historical data instead of a transaction-delta approximation, making the score more accurate for users who update balances manually.
- Single-snapshot state shows a dashed reference line as a baseline instead of a lone dot.
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.7

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Introduces the Standing tab — The Bearing, a proprietary financial health index scored 0–100 from six behavioral pillars: Discipline, Ballast, Provision, Composure, Momentum, and Reserve.

- Shareable card (assay seal, zero monetary amounts) exportable as PNG
- Collapsible explainer, pillar breakdown with progress bars, 6-month trend, behavioral guidance
- Clickable pillar names with expandable plain-English definitions
- Scoring formula with renormalization for missing data
- Also resolves all Obsidian store linter warnings from v0.2.5
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.6

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Resolves all Obsidian store linter warnings. No behavior changes.
- Replace createEl("div"/"span") with createDiv()/createSpan() across all UI files (139 occurrences)
- Fix Promise/void warnings in addDropdown callbacks
- Remove CSS !important — use higher-specificity selectors instead
- Remove partially-supported scrollbar-width: none
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.5

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Fixes
  - Payment modal now shows a live balance preview: Balance → Payment → Remaining as you type
  - Liability table has a dedicated Schedule column (next due date + monthly amount) — no longer crammed into the balance cell
  - Dashboard banner border is neutral by default; turns red only when a payment is due today or overdue
  - Overdue payments show "Xd overdue" label in red
  - Past-due payments now surface correctly in the dashboard banner (was silently dropped due to a >= 0 bug)
  - Pay button hidden on zero-balance liabilities
  - car_loan payments now log to Transport > Other (was incorrectly Transport > Fuel / Parking)

  Edit mode improvements
  - Liability cards in edit mode now expose all fields: monthly payment, due day, reminder days ahead, reminder toggle
  - New liability form: added "Remind N days before" input
  - New liability form: country is now derived from the selected currency instead of hardcoded to PH
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.4

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Navigation & mobile improvements

  - Sticky top tab bar replacing bottom nav (works on all devices)
  - Compact controls on mobile
  - Statement tabs scrollable on mobile

  Financial Statements
  - Amounts abbreviated: ¥300K, ¥13M, $1.2M
  - JPY/KRW show no decimals; USD/PHP show decimals only when needed
  - Income Statement budget grid scrollable on mobile
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.3

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Bug fixes and mobile improvements

  - Transferred card hidden when transfer tracker is disabled
  - Editing a transaction no longer causes double render
  - Add button defaults to the currently viewed month's date
  - Donut chart now shows currency symbol in center
  - Income Statement budget column annualized correctly
  - Statement tabs scroll horizontally on mobile
  - Cards grid layout fixed (3-col for 3 cards, 2x2 for 4)
  - iPhone home indicator spacing fixed
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.2

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description: Fix: resolve all Obsidian plugin store warnings
releases.name: Ledgr v0.2.1

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description: Fix: resolve all remaining Obsidian plugin store warnings
releases.name: Ledgr v0.1.9

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Release Notes — Ledgr v0.1.8

  Mobile UX overhaul, currency symbols, bottom navigation, and bug fixes.

  **Navigation**
  - New bottom navigation bar with active state indicators (top border, background tint, weight bump)
  -  Add button redesigned as a bordered square — distinct from navigation tabs
  - "Log" renamed to "Add" throughout
  - Settings button now uses a gear icon instead of text

  **Currency**
  - Currency symbols displayed everywhere: $, ¥, ₱, € instead of USD/JPY/PHP codes
  - 50+ currencies supported in the symbol map
  - Default currency changed to USD for new installs
  - Adding/removing currencies now instantly refreshes all open views

  **Mobile fixes**
  - Summary cards display in 2-column grid on mobile
  - Action buttons right-aligned, currency toggles left-aligned
  - Cash flow statement shows all 4 columns with compressed layout
  - Net Worth edit mode uses card layout — balance field always visible

  **Net Worth**
  - Add Account opens an inline form with name, currency, and type selector
  - Account type (bank/ewallet/cash/credit) selectable at creation
  - Investment Accounts table header fixed

  **Charts**
  - Savings rate gauge rebuilt using circular ring — no more arc math bugs
  - Gauge colors: green (≥20%), amber (10–19%), red (<10%)
  - Gauge value centered inside ring
releases.name: Ledgr v0.1.8

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description: Minor fixes in ui and resolved warnings.

releases.author: jcig789
releases.description:
Multi-currency personal finance for Obsidian.

Track spending, budgets, net worth, and international transfers — all stored as plain markdown in your vault. No accounts, no cloud, no subscriptions.

  **Features:** Dashboard · Budgets · Net Worth · Financial Statements · Savings Goals · Transfer Tracker · Monthly Review · Year-End Wrapped
releases.name: Ledgr v0.1.0
